description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the shru/arch-love-release:latest Docker image. Define a single job named build (which runs in the default stage) that executes the command love-release -W -M. Configure the job to collect the generated releases/the-john-game-win64.zip and releases/the-john-game-macosx.zip files as artifacts. No additional services, variables, caches, or trigger rules are required.
